_notes: Battle-map authoring data for Frontier Town (tutorial, spine node 'start'). rev 4: new painted art (fortified frontier waypoint per docs/MAP_PROMPTS_VERDANT.md level 1 — town core inside a palisade ring, gatehouse towers mid-west and mid-east, dense-forest border). Road traced from the pixel mask; enemies spawn in the WESTERN forest fringe (first waypoint off-canvas) and march east through both gates; leak point is the road running off the EAST edge. 8 build slots on the painted clearings' centroids (near/far mix: ~1.4-3.1 cells off the road so all tower types stay viable). Coordinates in image pixels; engine converts to grid space. Gemini sparkle watermark removed at (1398,585) via scripts/remove_gemini_sparkle.py.
